HomePage.xp_disc: My professional journey and key accomplishments
HomePage.f1_card_p1: • Development of API for internal company consultation.
HomePage.f1_card_p2: • Implemented paid service queries with caching, optimizing data flow and significantly reducing operational costs.
HomePage.f1_card_p3: • Other routine activities: creating unit tests and writing documentation

card2.title: Spring Boot Developer
card2.p1: • Creating APIs for consumption by the Angular frontend. Government project that handles death taxes and donations for the state of Minas Gerais - Brazil.
card2.p2: • I followed and was part of the entire development of the ITCD doação (donation taxes) project, which was migrated from a monolith to a microservices architecture.
card2.p3: • I implemented PDF generation and certification through Lacuna Software

card3.p1: • Creation of a retirement management system for civil servants in small towns.
card3.p2: • Allow administrators to analyze and manage their employees' hiring contributions. This allows for the provision of additional information that is automatically considered in projections.
card3.p3: • Implementation of a scheduling system. Admins provide available schedules, and the system allows users to schedule appointments, respecting the different municipalities.
card3.p4: • PDF generation with react-pdf for the projection system.
card3.p5: • Designed with special attention to application performance, user usability, and best security practices.
card3.p6: • Deploy the application on a VPS using Coolify.

card4.title: Founder & Full Stack Developer
card4.p1: • Built and launched momonei, my first SaaS product, focused on shared household finance management for couples and families.
card4.p2: • Implemented expense, income, goals, recurring bills, household sharing, dashboards, and financial history flows.
card4.p3: • Added production-grade authentication with email verification, password reset, secure sessions, and account protection.
card4.p4: • Integrated Stripe subscription billing, webhooks, billing portal access, and access restoration after checkout.
card4.p5: • Delivered PWA support with push notifications for recurring reminders and a production deployment flow using Docker.

about.title: How am I
about.subtitle: Get to know me better - my personality, values, and what drives me

personal_valies.title: Personal Values
personal_valies.p1: I get a weird amount of joy from debugging. There’s something satisfying about chasing down the root cause of an issue and turning chaos into clarity. For me, every tricky bug is an opportunity to learn — and maybe brag about later.
personal_valies.p2: I love working with people who care about what they do. Whether it’s pair programming, reviewing pull requests, or just sharing “aha!” moments, I believe collaboration turns good ideas into great ones.
personal_valies.p3: Tech moves fast — and that’s exactly what keeps me hooked. I’m constantly tinkering with new frameworks, experimenting with design patterns, or reading about how others solve the problems I haven’t hit… yet.

working_style.title: Work Style
working_style.p1: I believe polish isn’t optional — it’s part of the craft. From naming variables that make sense to fine-tuning UI spacing, the small things add up to something people actually enjoy using.
working_style.p2: I like to move fast, but not recklessly. I iterate, test, and adjust based on real feedback — because good software isn’t written once, it’s evolved.
working_style.p3: Behind every API call and pixel is a person trying to get something done. I code with that person in mind — designing experiences that feel smooth, intuitive, and respectful of their time.

about.beyond_subtitle: What I do when I'm not coding
about.travel_description: Exploring wonderful nature, knowing new cultures and people
about.family_description: Spending time with family is my source of joy, balance, and motivation in life.
about.chess_description: Online chess is my favorite pastime, lulululu1997 on lichess and chess.com
about.connect_subtitle: I'm always open to discussing new opportunities, interesting projects, or just having a chat about technology.
